search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted results to lastzwiki.com as requested. Prioritized concrete guide pages over home pages. No result was marked as proof for player-facing mechanics or costs.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster page with character listings, levels, and equipment section; useful for hero discovery and build cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, factions, levels, and equipment context.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research guide with category tabs and per-level badge cost tables; useful for locating research mechanics and cost data.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories and badge costs by level.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English landing page linking to heroes, research, alliance, buildings, and seasonal guides; good entry point for discovery.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to relevant guide sections and compare topics.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to lastz.fandom.com as requested. Results emphasize event and hero-related discovery leads. No result was treated as proof for player-facing mechanics beyond page-level descriptions.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle page. Includes a research-themed phase ('Age of Science') plus a hero-growth phase ('Hero Initiative') and ranking rewards.
results.primary_user_job: Find which daily event phases use research or hero upgrades.
claims_to_verify: Which cycles award points for research
Whether hero item use counts in the hero phase

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page. Lists hero classes and the main power inputs, useful for linking heroes to event goals.
results.primary_user_job: Understand hero types and what drives hero power.

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events. Good navigation lead for locating event mechanics and daily resets.
results.primary_user_job: Locate where event rules and tabs are organized.

search_records.search_notes: Search limited to www.packsify.com per policy. No matching pages were found for the provided query. Consider broadening to explicit Packsify blog/article slugs or related Last Z equipment pages within the same domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed results matched the allowed-domain query.

search_records.search_notes: Search stayed within mmediamreza.com and surfaced several Last Z-specific guide pages. Best leads are structure/building guides rather than generic home or alliance pages.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page on Shooter Camp training, upgrade caps, speed, and promotion use for ranged units.
results.primary_user_job: plan Shooter Camp upgrades and unit training

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page on Assaulter Camp training, speed bonuses, and power growth for melee/strike units.
results.primary_user_job: plan Assaulter Camp upgrades and unit training

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page on research progression, technology benefits, and second lab unlock.
results.primary_user_job: plan tech research and lab expansion
